name: Underground — themed page renders with clear purpose (not just aesthetic theatre)

planSteps.description: Wait up to 12 seconds for the page to render, including any themed animations or transitions
The page renders without an error boundary, blank screen, 404, or raw stack traces

The page has a clear title/heading explaining what the 'Underground' section is — a user landing here from the URL directly should understand its purpose without prior context. Purely aesthetic themes without explanation are unhelpful for real users.
If the page requires wallet connection or gates any content, that gating is disclosed clearly — no bait-and-switch where a prominent CTA silently does nothing when clicked
